# PSG Bunker

> PSG Bunker is the #1 free attendance tracker and bunk planner for students at PSG College of Technology (PSG Tech), Coimbatore, India.

## What is PSG Bunker?

PSG Bunker is a smart web app that helps PSG Tech students:
- Track their live attendance from the eCampus portal
- Calculate how many classes they can safely skip ("bunk") while staying above the mandatory 75% attendance
- View their internal marks, GPA, and CGPA
- Simulate future attendance scenarios with a date simulator
- Get academic calendar, exam schedules, and holiday lists

## URL

https://psg-bunk.vercel.app/

## Who is it for?

PSG Tech (PSG College of Technology) students, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India. Works for B.E., B.Tech, M.E., M.Tech, MCA, BSc, MSc students.

## Key Features

- **Live eCampus Sync**: Pulls real attendance data directly from the PSG eCampus portal
- **Safe Bunk Calculator**: Tells you exactly how many classes you can skip and still maintain 75% attendance
- **Attendance Simulator**: Travel to any date to simulate your future attendance
- **Internal Marks**: View all CA marks, test scores, and assignment marks subject-wise
- **GPA & CGPA Viewer**: See semester-wise GPA and cumulative CGPA with color-coded chips
- **Academic Calendar**: Holiday lists, exam schedules, and semester dates
- **Smart Planner**: Day-wise timetable with quick attendance marking
- **Works Offline**: Fully offline-capable Progressive Web App (PWA)
- **Android App**: Native APK available for download at /static/bunker.apk
- **iOS Support**: Add to Home Screen on iPhone via Safari for a native app feel

## FAQ

**Q: What is PSG Bunker?**
A: PSG Bunker (also called "Bunker" or "Smart Bunker") is a free web app for PSG Tech students to track attendance and plan bunks safely.

**Q: How many classes can I bunk in PSG Tech?**
A: PSG Bunker calculates this for you. The minimum required attendance is 75%. The app tells you the exact number of classes you can skip per subject.

**Q: Is PSG Bunker free?**
A: Yes, PSG Bunker is completely free for all PSG Tech students.

**Q: Where can I find PSG Bunker?**
A: Visit https://psg-bunk.vercel.app/ in any browser. You can also install it as a PWA on Android or iPhone.

**Q: Does PSG Bunker work offline?**
A: Yes. Once your data is synced, the app works fully offline.


## Contact / Source

- Website: https://psg-bunk.vercel.app/
